planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 now tests explicit stance-foot qfrc/WBC guard variants against the exp29 visible gate.

perspectives.product: targets exp81's remaining blocker: reward-only training cannot keep stance feet anchored
perspectives.architecture: reuses exp67 WBC-lite candidate rollout and adds stricter 8cm visible-gate annotation
perspectives.security: no credentials or external side effects
perspectives.qa: native sweep records raw JSON with drop, knee, hip, contact, slip, support, ZMP, return, and fall
perspectives.skeptic: Jacobian-transpose stance force can overconstrain the model and convert slip into fall or shallow depth

dod: raw native JSON per WBC guard variant
summary states whether any variant passes visible_8cm_gate

sources.note: Humanoid squat control combines optimized trajectory planning with WBC tracking.
Multi-contact WBC motivates posture correction under contact constraints.
MuJoCo contact/inverse dynamics notes caution that contact force constraints cannot be inferred from kinematics alone.
